storyHook: 突发状况，求助路人或报警，等待救援

narrative.who: 甲（当事人）· 乙（路人或接线员）
narrative.how: 保持冷静，清楚说明位置
narrative.method: 描述情况、请求帮助、等待救援、确认安全
narrative.event: 甲朋友摔倒受伤，需要尽快找人帮忙

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Help! My friend has had a bad fall.
turns.zh: 救命！我朋友摔得很重。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is the trouble? Say it quick.
turns.zh: 出什么事了？快告诉我。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is on the earth, not moving or talking.
turns.zh: 他倒在地上，不动也不说话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is he breathing? Can you see his chest go up and down?
turns.zh: 他还有呼吸吗？能看到他胸口起伏吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, his chest is moving, but his eyes are shut.
turns.zh: 有，他胸口在动，但眼睛闭着。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do not move him. I will send a car now.
turns.zh: 好的。别移动他。我马上派车来。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Please be quick. I am very troubled.
turns.zh: 请快点。我很不安。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What is your place? Give me the street name.
turns.zh: 你在什么位置？告诉我街道名字。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am where two roads come together.
turns.zh: 我在两条路交叉的地方。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is there a store or sign near you?
turns.zh: 你附近有商店或路牌吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, a place with a bright light. It is open all night.
turns.zh: 有，一家亮灯的店，通宵营业。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. What is the name of the place?
turns.zh: 好的。这家店叫什么名字？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The sign says 'Quick Store'. I am right here.
turns.zh: 招牌写着‘快客商店’，我就在门口。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have your place. The car will be there in five minutes.
turns.zh: 我定位到你了。救护车五分钟内到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you. I will keep talking to him.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我会一直跟他说话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is he breathing? Put your ear near his mouth.
turns.zh: 他有呼吸吗？把耳朵凑到他嘴边。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I can get his breath on my face.
turns.zh: 有，我能感觉到他呼出的气。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do not move his head or neck.
turns.zh: 好。别动他的头和脖子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will keep still. His face is so white.
turns.zh: 我保持不动。他脸好白。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is common after a fall. Keep him warm.
turns.zh: 摔倒后常见。给他保暖。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put my coat over him. Is the car coming?
turns.zh: 我给他盖了外套。车来了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, two minutes. I see it on my box.
turns.zh: 快了，还有两分钟。我盒子上能看到。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I get a sound far off. Is that the car?
turns.zh: 我听到远处有声音。是救护车吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is the car. It will be at your road end in a short time.
turns.zh: 对，是救护车。马上到你那条路口了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see the blue light now. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 我看到蓝灯了。谢谢你帮忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The car is here. I will go to them.
turns.zh: 车到了。我过去接他们。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will be here with him.
turns.zh: 好。我在这儿陪着他。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Two men are coming with a bed on wheels.
turns.zh: 两个人推着轮床过来了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are quick. He is still out.
turns.zh: 他们动作很快。他还没醒。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He is talking to me. He says, what is the news?
turns.zh: 他在跟我说话。他问有什么消息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Say he went down and did not get up.
turns.zh: 跟人说，他摔了，没起来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I did. They are putting him on the bed now.
turns.zh: 说了。他们正把他抬上床。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They will take him to the hospital. You go with them.
turns.zh: 他们会送他去医院。你跟着去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will. Thank you for your time.
turns.zh: 嗯，我会的。谢谢你花时间帮忙。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No trouble. I hope he gets well quick.
turns.zh: 不客气。希望他快点好起来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The man on the bed is opening his eyes.
turns.zh: 床上那人睁眼了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. That is a good sign. Is he saying anything?
turns.zh: 好。这是好兆头。他在说什么吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He is saying my name. He seems mixed up.
turns.zh: 他在叫我的名字。他好像有点迷糊。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is normal after a fall. Let him rest.
turns.zh: 摔倒后正常。让他休息。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The door is open. The men with the bed are here.
turns.zh: 门开了。推轮床的人到了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They will put him on the bed now.
turns.zh: 他们现在要把他抬上轮床了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will go with him.
turns.zh: 嗯。我跟他一起去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You have my number. Send word if you need anything.
turns.zh: 你有我的号码。需要什么就传话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you. I will say how he is.
turns.zh: 谢谢。我会告诉你他的情况。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Keep your head up.
turns.zh: 好。打起精神。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. He is my friend.
turns.zh: 我会的。他是我朋友。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The man is ready. Get in.
turns.zh: 司机准备好了。上车吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I am going now.
turns.zh: 好。我这就走了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will be here for a bit. be safe.
turns.zh: 我在这儿待一会儿。安全第一。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You too. And thank you again.
turns.zh: 你也是。再次感谢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Is he breathing? I need to see.
turns.zh: 他在呼吸吗？我得看看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, slow but safe. Do not move him.
turns.zh: 是的，慢但稳。别动他。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put my coat over him. It's cold.
turns.zh: 我把外套盖他身上了。天冷。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. The car is on its way.
turns.zh: 好。救护车已经在路上了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: How long? It seems like hours.
turns.zh: 要多久？感觉像过了几个小时。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: About five more minutes. Keep talking.
turns.zh: 大概再五分钟。继续说话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a light. Is that them?
turns.zh: 我看到灯光了。是他们吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is the car for ill persons. Wave your arm.
turns.zh: 是的，那是病车。挥挥手。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are here. Thank you for your help.
turns.zh: 他们到了。谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You did well. I will let them take over.
turns.zh: 你做得很好。我让他们接手了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The men are out now. They have a box.
turns.zh: 他们下车了，拿着一个箱子。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Let them do their work. Step back a bit.
turns.zh: 好。让他们干活，你退后一点。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are putting something over his face.
turns.zh: 他们在他脸上放了什么东西。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is for air. It will help him get better.
turns.zh: 那是供氧的，会让他好转。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: His eyes are open now. He is looking at me.
turns.zh: 他睁眼了，正看着我。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good sign. Talk to him in a low voice.
turns.zh: 好兆头。轻声跟他说话。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You are safe now. The men are here.
turns.zh: 你现在安全了。他们到了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He gave a small smile. I have a feeling he sees me.
turns.zh: 他微微笑了一下，我觉得他认出我了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Keep him warm. They will take him to the hospital now.
turns.zh: 给他保暖。他们现在要送他去医院。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will go with him. Thanks for waiting.
turns.zh: 我跟他一起去。谢谢你等着。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The door is open. Come inside.
turns.zh: 门开了。上来吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: May I be by him?
turns.zh: 我可以坐他旁边吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, take that seat. Talk to him in a low voice.
turns.zh: 行，坐那儿吧。低声跟他说话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: He has my hand. That is good.
turns.zh: 他握着我的手，这很好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Keep his head still. Do not let him move.
turns.zh: 让他头别动，别让他乱动。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will not let go. How long to the hospital?
turns.zh: 我不会松手的。到医院还要多久？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: About ten minutes. We are almost there.
turns.zh: 大约十分钟，快到了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: His color is coming back. That is a good sign.
turns.zh: 他脸色好多了，好兆头。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, he is getting better. You did well.
turns.zh: 对，他在好转。你做得很好。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Thank you for your help. I was very much in fear.
turns.zh: 谢谢你的帮助。我刚才吓坏了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He is opening his eyes. Look.
turns.zh: 他睁眼了。你看。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Oh, that is a good thing. Hello there, friend.
turns.zh: 哦，那是好事。嘿，朋友。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: He seems mixed up. Where are we?
turns.zh: 他好像很迷糊。我们在哪儿？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We are in the car. You had a fall.
turns.zh: 我们在车上。你摔了一跤。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: My head is giving me trouble. What is the trouble?
turns.zh: 我头疼。出什么事了？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You had a fall in the street. But you are safe now.
turns.zh: 你在街上摔倒了。不过现在安全了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see it now. We were walking.
turns.zh: 我想起来了。我们刚才在走路。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, you went down hard. I was so troubled.
turns.zh: 对，你摔得很重。我担心坏了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am troubled. Thank you.
turns.zh: 给你添麻烦了。谢谢你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: No trouble at all. Just rest now.
turns.zh: 一点不麻烦。现在好好休息吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The man on the line said to keep talking to you.
turns.zh: 电话那头的人让我一直跟你说话。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. It keeps my mind off the pain.
turns.zh: 那挺好。能让我不去想疼。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do you see the lights? They are getting nearer.
turns.zh: 你看到灯光了吗？越来越近了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I see them. Red and blue. That is the car for the ill.
turns.zh: 嗯，看到了。红蓝相间。是救护车。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are stopping. The door is opening.
turns.zh: 他们停下了。门开了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let them come. I will be all right.
turns.zh: 让他们过来吧。我会没事的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are here. You are in good hands now.
turns.zh: 他们到了。你现在有专业人员照顾了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The men are quick. One is taking my arm.
turns.zh: 他们动作很快。有个人扶住我的胳膊了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They will put you on a board. Do not move.
turns.zh: 他们会把你放上担架板。别动。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am on it now. It is not hard.
turns.zh: 我已经上来了。不难受。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: They are putting you in the car. I will come with you.
turns.zh: 他们正把你抬上车。我跟你一起去。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are still on the line. Say thanks to him.
turns.zh: 你电话还通着。跟那人说声谢谢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Thank you, sir. You were a great help.
turns.zh: 谢谢你，先生。你帮了大忙。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The line is dead now. They have done their part.
turns.zh: 电话挂了。他们完成了任务。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The man is going quick. But the car is smooth.
turns.zh: 那人开得很快，但车很稳。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We will be at the hospital in five minutes.
turns.zh: 我们五分钟就到医院了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. I have my fingers back. That is a good sign.
turns.zh: 太好了。我又能感觉到手指了。这是个好兆头。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The doctor is here. You will be all right.
turns.zh: 医生来了。你会没事的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I am with you. Do not be troubled.
turns.zh: 我陪着你。别怕。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The night is over. We made it.
turns.zh: 天快亮了。我们挺过来了。

storyBlurb: 深夜街头，朋友突然摔倒昏迷，甲惊慌失措。冷静拨打急救电话，清晰报出位置，在等待中守护朋友，最终救援赶到。
storyScript:
【开场·发生意外】夜晚的街道空旷寂静，只有路灯投下昏黄的光圈。甲和朋友并肩走着，忽然朋友脚下一滑，整个人重重摔在地上，发出一声闷响。甲蹲下身，看到朋友紧闭双眼、脸色苍白，怎么叫都没有反应。心跳瞬间加速，手掌渗出冷汗，但甲强迫自己镇定下来——必须立刻求助。

【进行·求助应对】甲掏出手机，手指微颤地按下120。接通后，努力让声音平稳：这里有人摔倒昏迷，需要救护车。接线员的声音冷静而清晰，询问具体位置。甲环顾四周，看到路口的路牌和一家便利店，迅速报出街道名称和附近标志物。接线员继续引导：请保持电话畅通，不要移动伤者，注意保暖。甲脱下外套盖在朋友身上，一边回答一边留意朋友的呼吸。

【进行·等待救援】时间仿佛被拉长，每一秒都格外煎熬。甲蹲在朋友身边，不断轻声呼唤名字，偶尔听到远处传来救护车的鸣笛声，却迟迟不见踪影。接线员的声音从听筒传来：救护车已出发，请保持耐心。甲深吸一口气，再次确认位置：我在XX路与XX街交叉口，旁边有一家24小时便利店。终于，红蓝灯光在街角闪烁，越来越近。

【收束·危机解除】救护车停下，医护人员迅速下车检查朋友状况，抬上担架。甲向接线员道谢，挂断电话，跟着上了车。朋友被戴上氧气面罩，但呼吸渐渐平稳。甲握住朋友的手，感受到微微的回握，悬着的心终于落下。车窗外夜色依旧，但车厢里暖意渐生，危机已经过去。
